title: Highway Resort
desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

desc: Aspiring boxer Shravan Singh clashes with a powerful federation head, Bhagwan Das Mishra, but things worsen when he falls for Bhagwan's niece.

title: Crime Stories
desc: Crime Stories uncovers real-life investigations, revealing shocking crimes, suspects, and twists as detectives chase truth and justice through evidence, interviews, and hidden motives.

title: 102 Not Out
desc: 102-year-old, played by Amitabh Bachchan, striving for a world record while navigating his relationship with his melancholic 75-year-old son, played by Rishi Kapoor.

title: Apna Sapna Money Money
desc: Satyabol, a devout Hindu, opposes his daughter Shivani's relationship with Arjun, a Christian. Arjun turns to his cunning cousin, Kishan, to help unite him with Shivani despite the obstacles.

desc: A romantic film exploring youthful love, emotions, and family bonds, portraying tender moments, conflicts, and realizations that redefine relationships and heartfelt connections.

title: Jazbaa
desc: Anuradha, a fearless lawyer, faces a nightmare when kidnappers demand she defends a rapist to save her daughter's life. Will she surrender?

desc: After don Yugandhar is killed in a police encounter, Superintendent Jaganath trains his lookalike to impersonate him and take down his gang.

title: Mantra
desc: A professor decides to buy an allegedly haunted ancestral property on the condition that someone stays there. A local goon spends three months in the house in a bid to earn a quick profit.

desc: Join our engaging devotional program to deepen your spirituality, connect with like-minded individuals, and explore meaningful practices that enrich your daily life and strengthen your faith.

desc: A childless couple worships Maa Vaishno Devi. When a demon destroys their ritual, the goddess defeats the demon and blesses the couple with lasting fortune together.
